papers_mined.title: Lithuanian Sutartinės Polyphony Frontiers (2024)
papers_mined.note: Secondal dissonances via horizontal voice movement, not vertical harmonization; Schwebungs-Diaphonie beat-diaphony; horizontal-not-hierarchical voice structure.

papers_mined.title: Sutartinės UNESCO ICH
papers_mined.note: Lithuanian multipart song tradition; voices stay rhythmically and intervalically separate (secondal); voice independence.

papers_mined.title: Sutartinės PMC
papers_mined.note: Secondal dissonance ~1.7 semitones; each voice maintains independent trajectory; orthogonal channels.

papers_mined.title: Schwebungsdiaphonie Dissonance Academia
papers_mined.note: Beat-diaphony intervals; voice channels orthogonal in pitch space yet rhythmically interlocked.

papers_mined.title: CLoRA Controlled Low-Rank Adaptation Subspace (ACL 2025)
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: constrains null-space direction of update matrices via orthogonal regularization; pre-defined subspace constraint.

papers_mined.title: StelLA Stiefel Subspace Learning LoRA (NeurIPS 2025 Spotlight)
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: geometry-aware LoRA extension; orthonormality constraints on Stiefel manifold separating input/output subspaces.

papers_mined.title: O-LoRA Orthogonal Subspace Learning (EMNLP 2023)
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: incrementally learns new LoRA enforcing orthogonality between current/past LoRA subspaces.

papers_mined.title: Continual Gradient Low-Rank Projection Fine-Tuning (ACL 2025)
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: continual low-rank projection with orthogonal subspaces.
